Or did they think Kali wouldn't have survived out in the world on her own? El found Kali through a photo, so why didn't Dr. Brenner use El to find her when her abilities were stronger? Like EL with her powers, I'm sure there was a pattern to Kali's powers that were documented as 'strange occurrences' while life in crime. Also, Kali and her crew were offing people who once worked with Dr. Brenner, that right there is a pattern in itself. All they had to do was follow the blood trail and they would've found her. Dr. Brenner could have easily found Kali as he did EL; he has the manpower to do so. IDK, I guess I have a lot of questions. Plus, the way Dr. Brenner was attached to these kids; it makes it hard to believe that he would've just forgotten about Kali (number 8). He never forgot about Henry, but he forgot about Kali.
